     Source: claude-plugin-harness-best-practices-en.md § 4.9.
     Last sync: 2026-04-18. -->
#### Location and Required Structure

```
my-plugin/
├── .claude-plugin/
│   └── marketplace.json   ← Must be here
├── skills/
└── agents/
```

`marketplace.json` must live inside `.claude-plugin/`. Placing it at the root will not be recognized.

**Minimum valid structure:**

```json
{
  "name": "my-team-plugins",
  "owner": {
    "name": "My Team",
    "email": "ops@example.com"
  },
  "plugins": [
    {
      "name": "my-plugin",
      "source": ".",
      "description": "Team workflow automation plugin"
    }
  ]
}
```

| Field | Required | Rule |
|-------|----------|------|
| `name` | ✅ | kebab-case, no reserved names |
| `owner.name` | ✅ | String |
| `owner.email` | ❌ | Optional |
| `plugins` | ✅ | Array (empty array triggers a warning) |
| `plugins[].name` | ✅ | kebab-case |
| `plugins[].source` | ✅ | See source types below |
| `plugins[].description` | ❌ | Missing triggers a warning |
| `plugins[].version` | ❌ | Lower priority than plugin.json when both are present |
| `plugins[].strict` | ❌ | Defaults to `true` |
